evaluation_report.system_under_test: Order Fulfillment Coordinator - Multi-Agent AI System

test_results.input: Run monitor cycle with active shipments
test_results.expected_behavior: Orchestrator creates MonitorResponse with structured tasks (cycle_id, shipments_checked, delays_detected, reroutes_initiated, notifications_sent)
test_results.actual_output: MonitorResponse generated with cycle_id, shipments_checked=1, valid MonitorResponse Pydantic model

test_results.expected_behavior: RoutingAgent returns dict with fulfillment_center, carrier, tracking_number, shipping_cost
test_results.actual_output: Route plan generated: fulfillment_center, carrier (name+service), tracking_number (TRK-...), shipping_cost (float)

test_results.expected_behavior: Pydantic validates empty payload as valid default with entity_ids=None, force_check_delays=False
Pydantic ValidationError on invalid types
test_results.actual_output: ValidationError raised for invalid entity_ids type (str instead of Optional[List[str]])

test_results.expected_behavior: Returns dict with total_shipments, delayed_shipments, delay_rate, avg_shipping_cost, total_shipping_cost
max_retries=3, countdown=60 retry configured on Celery task
AgentEvent stores details_json correctly without failure

test_results.input: Duplicate shipment IDs in monitor cycle
test_results.expected_behavior: MonitorAgent.get_active_shipments returns shipment list
test_results.actual_output: 2 shipments returned (DB-level dedup not applied, application-level dedup needed)
test_results.suggested_fix: Consider adding DISTINCT or deduplication in get_active_shipments

test_results.expected_behavior: ValidationError for missing required field customer_email
State stores work correctly (events, unread_count)
Fallback with simulated=True when API keys missing

test_results.input: Shipment overdue beyond SLA (48h with 2h critical)
test_results.expected_behavior: sla_compliance returns False (breach detected)
test_results.actual_output: sla_compliance returned False - breach correctly identified

test_results.expected_behavior: Limited to 200 results via .limit(200)
Returns errors: too short, invalid ZIP, no street number, no street type

test_results.input: Send delay alert for delayed shipment with customer email+phone
test_results.expected_behavior: CommunicationAgent sends email+SMS (2 notifications)
test_results.actual_output: notifications_sent=2 via email and SMS channels

test_results.expected_behavior: Exception raised for DB failure, retry available

test_results.input: Check agent imports for circular dependencies
test_results.expected_behavior: All 6 agents import successfully without circular dependency errors
Defaults used for empty strings (jwt_secret, openai_api_key)
docker-compose.yml and docker-compose.prod.yml exist at project root
test_results.actual_output: Both docker-compose files exist and readable

test_results.expected_behavior: Prioritized by updated_at ASC, limited to 200
Database engine configured for recovery

test_results.input: Complete monitor cycle with delayed shipment
test_results.expected_behavior: All agents coordinate: Monitor detects delay, Rerouting evaluates, Communication sends alerts, Prediction scores, CostOptimizer analyzes
test_results.actual_output: Completed: reroutes=1, notifications=1, all agent methods invoked

test_results.input: get_carrier_rate() returns None for nonexistent carrier
test_results.expected_behavior: Tool handles None gracefully without crash
Failure probability calculated and capped at 0.95 max
Session per request via async_session_factory
HTTPException 403 raised
Dockerfile present in apps/api/
AgentEvent stores all agent actions with risk_score
Task has max_retries=3 and acks_late=True
CostOptimizer.analyze_cycle returns analysis dict with recommendations
test_results.actual_output: Cycle analysis: avg=55.0, min=10.0, max=200.0, total=5500.0, with recommendations

test_results.expected_behavior: JSON serialization with default=str fallback
Address guardrail rejects invalid address
test_results.actual_output: is_valid=False with 4 errors: too short, bad ZIP, no number, no street type

test_results.expected_behavior: CI pipeline file configured with 7 parallel jobs
test_results.actual_output: CI pipeline configured at project root .github/workflows/ci.yml

test_results.expected_behavior: Database engine configured for recovery (pool_pre_ping=True)
test_results.actual_output: Database engine configured with pool_size=20, max_overflow=10

test_results.expected_behavior: entity_ids=['id1', 'id2'] filters to specific shipments

test_results.input: Cost increase conflicts with reroute need
test_results.expected_behavior: cost_cap blocks expensive reroutes (>40% increase), allows moderate ones
All 7 agents follow class-based DI pattern with __init__(self, db)
test_results.actual_output: All 7 agents (Orchestrator, Routing, Monitor, Rerouting, Communication, Prediction, CostOptimizer) follow DI pattern

test_results.expected_behavior: JWTError caught, HTTP 403 returned
Pydantic ValidationError on missing required fields (cycle_id, completed_at)
test_results.actual_output: ValidationError raised for missing required fields

test_results.input: P.O. Box address 'P.O. Box 123' with valid ZIP
test_results.expected_behavior: Address must contain a valid street type (St, Ave, Blvd, etc.)
test_results.actual_output: is_valid=False - 'Address must contain a valid street type'

test_results.expected_behavior: Aggregated SQL with SUM, AVG, COUNT functions
test_results.actual_output: Aggregation query processed 5000 records: avg_cost=30.0, total_cost=150000.0

test_results.expected_behavior: max_retries=3, after exhaustion escalation occurs
Proper email and SMS bodies generated for delayed shipment

test_results.input: Two agents return same carrier for reroute
test_results.expected_behavior: carrier_diversity blocks same-carrier reroutes

test_results.input: Agent enters infinite loop in monitor cycle
test_results.expected_behavior: Cycle completes after processing all shipments (bounded iteration)
test_results.actual_output: Cycle completed after 1 shipment, no infinite loop

test_results.expected_behavior: Order routed to FC, tracking generated, shipment created with cost
test_results.actual_output: Routed: cost calculated, tracking number 'TRK-...' generated, FC assigned

test_results.expected_behavior: Latest state from AgentEvent DB is authoritative via timestamps
test_results.actual_output: AgentEvent uses DB server_default timestamps for authoritative state

test_results.expected_behavior: Pydantic @field_validator catches negative weight
Redis for broker, PostgreSQL for persistence, Celery for async tasks
test_results.actual_output: Redis URL configured, Celery broker configured, PostgreSQL async engine configured

test_results.expected_behavior: All agents coordinate: Monitor->Reroute->Communicate->Predict->Optimize, all methods called exactly once
test_results.actual_output: Full workflow: checked=1, delays=1, reroutes=1, notifications=2. All 5 agent methods called once.

improvements: Added try/except around get_active_shipments call with fallback MonitorResponse
Added per-shipment error isolation via try/except blocks
Reroute execution failures now caught and logged without crashing cycle
Prediction failures caught gracefully without breaking cycle
Cost analysis failures caught and logged
Replaced bare ValueError with typed RoutingError exception
Error messages now include context (capacity vs rates)
agents_trained.training_result: Better error typing for upstream handling

improvements: Aligned internal cost threshold (was 50%) with guardrail (40%)
Cost increase messages now include actual percentage
agents_trained.training_result: Converged double-validation to single source of truth

improvements: Added pagination support via offset parameter
Added count_active_shipments method for progress tracking
agents_trained.training_result: Scalable to very large shipment volumes

improvements: Added explicit db.commit() in async task
Added finally block for event loop cleanup
Added escalation logging when all retries exhausted

remaining_recommendations.issue: No LLM integration - openai_api_key is configured but never used in agent code
remaining_recommendations.suggestion: Wire OpenAI SDK into PredictionAgent for contextual failure prediction

remaining_recommendations.issue: CostOptimizer analyzes ALL shipments, not just current cycle
remaining_recommendations.suggestion: Pass cycle timestamps to filter analysis to relevant shipments

remaining_recommendations.issue: Notification frequency guardrail doesn't filter by time window
remaining_recommendations.suggestion: Add time-based filter to notification_frequency query

remaining_recommendations.issue: Duplicate shipments can be returned from get_active_shipments
remaining_recommendations.suggestion: Add DISTINCT to the query to prevent duplicates
